Downtown Center-Leroy St Outbound

Description:

The Downtown Center-Leroy St Outbound leaves campus and travels through Riverside Dr in Johnson City & Binghamton, and Leroy Street in Westside Binghamton enroute to the University Downtown Center.

Operation Time:

Weekdays:
8:40 A.M. to 6:45 P.M.


Weekends:
N/A

Notes:

Scroll below for a graphic map of the Downtown Center-Leroy St Outbound, its schedule, and the stops along its route.

① Leaves the University Union

② Riverside Dr & Columbus Pl

③ Leroy & Murray Streets

④ Arrives at the University Downtown Center


① ② ③ ④
7:30 AM 7:36 AM 7:41 AM 7:48 AM
8:55 AM 9:01 AM 9:06 AM 9:13 AM
10:40 AM 10:46 AM 10:51 AM 10:58 AM
12:10 PM 12:16 PM 12:21 PM 12:28 PM
1:45 PM 1:51 PM 1:56 PM 2:03 PM
3:55 PM 4:01 PM 4:06 PM 4:13 PM
4:50 PM 4:56 PM 5:01 PM 5:08 PM
6:45 PM 6:51 PM 6:56 PM 7:03 PM

There is no weekend DCL service. Please use BC Transit for service availability.

Bus Stops:
University Union
Physical Facilities*
Bunn Hill/Bunn Hill Access Rd*
Ethel Street
Elfred Street
Columbus Place
Margaret Street
Riverside Dr & Beethoven St -
Lourdes Hospital
Beethoven & Leroy Streets
Laurel Avenue
Chestnut Street
Murray Street
Riverside Dr & Front St
Visions Memorial Arena

© OCC Transport Inc.
